body.title: SQLite import guard for wild_igor/igor — raise on any sqlite3 use
body.result: Guard installed in wild_igor/igor/__init__.py — raises on sqlite3.connect(); ebook_reader + learner fixed to use real_sqlite3; androidkindlekey vendor exempt
body.description:
Create wild_igor/igor/_sqlite_guard.py that patches sys.modules['sqlite3'] with a stub whose connect() raises RuntimeError. Import it at the top of wild_igor/igor/__init__.py so any SQLite usage anywhere in Igor explodes at import time rather than silently at runtime. Fix all breakages that result.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/_sqlite_guard.py (new), wild_igor/igor/__init__.py, any files in wild_igor/igor/ that import sqlite3
**Design rules:** no-sqlite (enforces the hard rule at the module boundary)
**Scope boundary:** guard + fixes inside wild_igor/igor/ only; no changes to lab/, tests/, or external tooling
**Test plan:** tests/ full suite must pass with guard active; any sqlite3 import in wild_igor/igor/ that survives will cause an import error caught by tests
